import frappe


def create_home_page():

   # Check if a homepage already exists

   if frappe.db.exists("Web Page", "Home"):

       print("✅ Home page already exists.")

       return


   # Create new web page document

   web_page = frappe.get_doc({

       "doctype": "Web Page",

       "title": "Home",

       "route": "/",

       "content_type": "Rich Text",

       "published": 1,

       "main_section": """

           <div style="text-align:center; padding:50px;">

               <h1>Welcome to Our Website!</h1>

               <p>This is your homepage built using Frappe 💪</p>

               <a href="/contact" class="btn btn-primary">Contact Us</a>

           </div>

       """

   })


   web_page.insert(ignore_permissions=True)

   frappe.db.commit()

   print("🎉 Home page created successfully!")


# Run the function

create_home_page()

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-US">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta name="description" content="List of V Belt Manufactures in India, V Belts Suppliers in India" />
  <meta name="keywords" content="v fit belts, list of v belt manufactures in india, v belts suppliers in india, rubber v belt manufacturers in india" />
  <title>V-FIT | Industrial & Automotive Belts</title>
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Barlow:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;1,300&family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    :root {
      --clr-ink: #0d0f14;
      --clr-steel: #1a1e28;
      --clr-panel: #f4f1eb;
      --clr-warm: #e8e2d5;
      --clr-amber: #c8860a;
      --clr-amber-light: #e5a020;
      --clr-amber-pale: #f5c842;
      --clr-rust: #b84a1e;
      --clr-white: #fdfcf8;
      --clr-text: #2c2a25;
      --clr-muted: #6b6558;
      --font-display: 'Syne', sans-serif;
      --font-body: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
      --font-cond: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    }
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body {
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      font-size: 15px;
      color: var(--clr-text);
      background: var(--clr-white);
      line-height: 1.7;
      overflow-x: hidden;
    }
    a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; }
    img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; }

    /* ========== TOP BAR ========== */
    .topbar {
      background: var(--clr-ink);
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
      font-family: var(--font-cond);
      font-size: 13px;
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      padding: 8px 0;
    }
    .topbar-inner {
      max-width: 1200px;
      margin: auto;
      padding: 0 30px;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      flex-wrap: wrap;
      gap: 8px;
    }
    .topbar-left {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
    }
    .topbar-left span {
      color: var(--clr-amber);
      font-weight: 600;
      font-size: 14px;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }
    .topbar-left em {
      font-style: normal;
    }
    .topbar-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
    .social-link {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      width: 28px;
      height: 28px;
      border-radius: 4px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
      font-size: 13px;
      transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s;
    }
    .social-link:hover { background: var(--clr-amber); color: var(--clr-ink); }
    .social-link svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; fill: currentColor; }

    /* ========== HEADER ========== */
    #main-header {
      background: var(--clr-white);
      border-bottom: 2px solid var(--clr-warm);
      position: sticky;
      top: 0;
      z-index: 9999;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    }
    .header-inner {
      max-width: 1200px;
      margin: auto;
      padding: 0 30px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      height: 80px;
      gap: 20px;
    }
    .logo-wrap a { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
    .logo-wrap img { height: 55px; width: auto; }
    .logo-text {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: 22px;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: var(--clr-ink);
      line-height: 1;
    }
    .logo-text span { color: var(--clr-amber); }

    /* NAV */
    .main-nav ul { list-style: none; display: flex; gap: 4px; align-items: center; }
    .main-nav > ul > li { position: relative; }
    .main-nav > ul > li > a {
      display: block;
      padding: 10px 14px;
      font-family: var(--font-cond);
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--clr-steel);
      border-radius: 4px;
      transition: color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
    }
    .main-nav > ul > li > a:hover,
    .main-nav > ul > li.active > a {
      color: var(--clr-amber);
      background: rgba(200,134,10,0.07);
    }
    .main-nav ul li ul {
      position: absolute;
      top: calc(100% + 6px);
      left: 0;
      background: var(--clr-ink);
      min-width: 220px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 8px 0;
      opacity: 0;
      visibility: hidden;
      transform: translateY(8px);
      transition: all 0.25s ease;
      box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
      z-index: 1000;
      max-height: 70vh;
      overflow-y: auto;
    }
    .main-nav ul li:hover > ul { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; transform: translateY(0); }
    .main-nav ul li ul li a {
      display: block;
      padding: 8px 20px;
      font-family: var(--font-cond);
      font-size: 12px;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      font-weight: 500;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
      transition: color 0.2s, padding-left 0.2s;
    }
    .main-nav ul li ul li a:hover { color: var(--clr-amber); padding-left: 26px; }
    .header-contact-info {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: flex-end;
      font-family: var(--font-cond);
      font-size: 13px;
      line-height: 1.4;
    }
    .header-contact-info .phone {
      font-size: 16px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--clr-amber);
      letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    }
    .header-contact-info .hours { color: var(--clr-muted); font-size: 12px; }

    /* Mobile menu toggle */
    .mobile-toggle {
      display: none;
      background: none;
      border: none;
      cursor: pointer;
      padding: 8px;
      flex-direction: column;
      gap: 5px;
    }
    .mobile-toggle span {
      display: block;
      width: 24px;
      height: 2px;
      background: var(--clr-ink);
      transition: all 0.3s;
    }
    @media (max-width: 900px) {
      .mobile-toggle { display: flex; }
      .main-nav { display: none; position: absolute; top: 80px; left: 0; width: 100%; background: var(--clr-white); padding: 16px 20px 24px; box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); }
      .main-nav.open { display: block; }
      .main-nav ul { flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; }
      .main-nav ul li ul { position: static; opacity: 1; visibility: visible; transform: none; box-shadow: none; background: var(--clr-warm); margin: 4px 0 4px 16px; border-radius: 6px; max-height: none; }
      .header-contact-info { display: none; }
    }

    /* ========== HERO SLIDER ========== */
    .hero {
      position: relative;
      height: 75vh;
      min-height: 480px;
      max-height: 700px;
      overflow: hidden;
      background: var(--clr-ink);
    }
    .slide {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 1s ease;
    }
    .slide.active { opacity: 1; }
    .slide img {
      width: 100%;
      height: 100%;
      object-fit: cover;
      object-position: center;
      opacity: 0.55;
    }
    .slide-content {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: center;
      padding: 0 60px;
      max-width: 800px;
    }
    .slide-tag {
      font-family: var(--font-cond);
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.3em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--clr-amber);
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
    }
    .slide-tag::before {
      content: '';
      display: block;
      width: 40px;
      height: 2px;
      background: var(--clr-amber);
    }
    .slide h1 {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: clamp(38px, 6vw, 72px);
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #fff;
      line-height: 1.05;
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      text-shadow: 0 2px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    }
    .slide h1 em {
      font-style: normal;
      color: var(--clr-amber-pale);
    }
    .slide p {
      font-family: var(--font-body);
      font-size: 18px;
      font-weight: 300;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
      max-width: 500px;
    }
    .hero-arrows {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 32px;
      right: 40px;
      display: flex;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .hero-arrow {
      width: 44px;
      height: 44px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
      border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
      color: #fff;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.2s;
      font-size: 18px;
    }
    .hero-arrow:hover { background: var(--clr-amber); border-color: var(--clr-amber); }
    .hero-dots {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 40px;
      left: 60px;
      display: flex;
      gap: 8px;
    }
    .hero-dot {
      width: 8px;
      height: 8px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
      cursor: pointer;
      transition: all 0.3s;
    }
    .hero-dot.active { background: var(--clr-amber); width: 28px; border-radius: 4px; }

    /* ========== SECTION COMMONS ========== */
    section { padding: 80px 0; }
    .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: auto; padding: 0 30px; }
    .section-label {
      font-family: var(--font-cond);
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.3em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--clr-amber);
      margin-bottom: 12px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .section-label::after {
      content: '';
      flex: 1;
      max-width: 48px;
      height: 2px;
      background: var(--clr-amber);
    }
    .section-title {
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-size: clamp(32px, 4vw, 52px);
      font-weight: 800;
      color: var(--clr-ink);
      line-height: 1.1;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
    }
    .section-subtitle {
      font-size: 16px;
      color: var(--clr-muted);
      max-width: 560px;
    }

    /* ========== WHO WE ARE ========== */
    #who-we-are {
      background: var(--clr-white);
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    .about-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
      gap: 80px;
      align-items: center;
    }
    @media (max-width: 760px) { .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; } }
    .about-image-block {
      position: relative;
    }
    .about-image-block img {
      width: 100%;
      border-radius: 12px;
      box-shadow: 20px 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    }
    .about-badge {
      position: absolute;
      bottom: -24px;
      right: -24px;
      background: var(--clr-amber);
      color: var(--clr-ink);
      padding: 20px 28px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      font-family: var(--font-display);
      font-weight: 800;
      box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(200,134,10,0.35);
    }

  <script>
    // Mobile menu toggle
    const mobileToggle = document.getElementById('mobile-toggle');
    const mainNav = document.getElementById('main-nav');
    mobileToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
      mainNav.classList.toggle('open');
    });

    // Hero slider
    const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.slide');
    const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.hero-dot');
    let current = 0;
    let autoTimer;

    function goToSlide(n) {
      slides[current].classList.remove('active');
      dots[current].classList.remove('active');
      current = (n + slides.length) % slides.length;
      slides[current].classList.add('active');
      dots[current].classList.add('active');
    }

    function startAuto() {
      autoTimer = setInterval(() => goToSlide(current + 1), 5000);
    }

    document.getElementById('next-slide').addEventListener('click', () => {
      clearInterval(autoTimer);
      goToSlide(current + 1);
      startAuto();
    });
    document.getElementById('prev-slide').addEventListener('click', () => {
      clearInterval(autoTimer);
      goToSlide(current - 1);
      startAuto();
    });
    dots.forEach(dot => {
      dot.addEventListener('click', () => {
        clearInterval(autoTimer);
        goToSlide(parseInt(dot.dataset.slide));
        startAuto();
      });
    });
    startAuto();
  </script>
